---
format: html
title: plot_family_trait_comparison()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>plot_family_trait_comparison</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Plot Family-Level Trait Comparison for a Focal Taxon</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Builds a 'ggplot2' log<sub>10</sub>-scale
strip plot comparing the median trait value of a focal taxon against
all other taxa in the same taxonomic family. Grey jittered dots
represent all family members that meet the minimum record threshold;
a firebrick point marks the focal taxon.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>plot_family_trait_comparison(
  data_family_comparison,
  data_group_summary,
  sel_taxon,
  sel_domain,
  sel_min_n = 5L,
  graphical_options,
  verbose = TRUE
)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data_family_comparison">data_family_comparison</code></td>
<td>
<p>A tibble of per-taxon summary statistics for all taxa in the same
taxonomic family as 'sel_taxon', as returned by
[get_family_trait_summary()]. Must contain columns 'taxon_name'
(character), 'n' (integer), and 'median' (numeric).</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="data_group_summary">data_group_summary</code></td>
<td>
<p>A single-row tibble of per-group QC statistics for the focal taxon,
as produced by [generate_trait_qc_report()]. Must contain a numeric
column 'median' used to place the firebrick reference point.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="sel_taxon">sel_taxon</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Name of the focal taxon. Used in the plot title.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="sel_domain">sel_domain</code></td>
<td>
<p>Character scalar. Trait domain being inspected. Used in axis labels.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="sel_min_n">sel_min_n</code></td>
<td>
<p>Positive integer scalar. Minimum number of records a taxon must
have to appear in the plot. Defaults to '5L'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="graphical_options">graphical_options</code></td>
<td>
<p>Named list with elements 'width', 'height', 'units', 'dpi', and
'bg', as returned by 'get_active_config(&quot;graphical&quot;)'. Passed to
'ggview::canvas()'.</p>
</td></tr>
<tr><td><code id="verbose">verbose</code></td>
<td>
<p>Logical. If 'TRUE' (default), the number of taxa shown in the plot
after the 'sel_min_n' filter is reported via 'cli::cli_inform()'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>All taxa in 'data_family_comparison' with 'n &gt;= sel_min_n' are
shown as grey jittered points on a log<sub>
10</sub> x-axis. The focal taxon's median  (from
'data_group_summary') is overlaid as a larger firebrick point.
When no family members meet the 'sel_min_n' threshold the grey
layer is empty and only the focal taxon point is drawn.
</p>
<p>Plot layer order follows project conventions: 'ggplot2::ggplot()'
-&gt; scales -&gt; labels -&gt; theme -&gt; 'ggview::canvas()' -&gt; geoms.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A 'ggplot2' object. The plot is not printed; call 'print()' on the
return value to display it.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[get_family_trait_summary()], [plot_trait_group_distribution()],
[generate_trait_qc_report()]
</p>


<h3>Examples</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>## Not run: 
data_family &lt;-
  get_family_trait_summary(
    data_traits_raw = data_traits_raw,
    data_classification = data_classification,
    sel_taxon = "Anacyclus clavatus",
    sel_domain = "Leaf Area"
  )

data_summary &lt;-
  data_qc_report |&gt;
  dplyr::filter(
    taxon_name == "Anacyclus clavatus",
    trait_domain_name == "Leaf Area"
  )

graphical_options &lt;-
  get_active_config("graphical")

p &lt;-
  plot_family_trait_comparison(
    data_family_comparison = data_family,
    data_group_summary = data_summary,
    sel_taxon = "Anacyclus clavatus",
    sel_domain = "Leaf Area",
    sel_min_n = 5L,
    graphical_options = graphical_options
  )

base::print(p)

## End(Not run)
</code></pre>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
